problem id: af58b824
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  00101101 -> 01011011
  11001100 -> 10011110
  00110110 -> 01101101
  01110010 -> 11100111
  10100110 -> 01001001
  10100111 -> 01001011
  10111010 -> 01110001
  00010111 -> 00101110
  01011100 -> 10111010

query: 11011011
predicted answer: 10110000
